scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within biostatistics and data visualization scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: No methodological fallacies detected; outputs apply standard approaches appropriate to biostatistics and data visualization tasks.

code_usability.detail: Generated code executed without syntax errors or unresolvable dependency failures across all tested inputs.

functional_suitability.note: NaN p-value warning added to Error Handling; R script generation documented with --language r flag; column override documentation added

reliability.note: Fallback template with --input validation note; NaN warning closes silent exclusion gap; error handling comprehensive

performance_context.note: references/ folder with best_practices.md and example data; SKILL.md is 142 lines — well-sized

agent_usability.note: Column name overrides now mandatory in Assumptions; gene list file documentation added; NaN warning documented

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable; DESeq2/edgeR/limma mention aligns with user vocabulary

security.note: Local file I/O; no credentials; column name parameters not sanitized

maintainability.note: references/ folder with example data and best practices; clean script separation; requirements.txt present; all fixes applied cleanly

agent_specific.note: Good trigger precision; escape hatches for non-volcano tasks; R script generation now discoverable; composability good

key_strengths: NaN p-value warning now documented in Error Handling with explicit message template, closing the primary v1 silent exclusion gap
R script generation now documented with --language r flag and ggplot2/ggrepel output format
Column name overrides and gene list file now mandatory in Assumptions, improving output traceability
references/ folder with best_practices.md and example DEG data enables immediate testing and onboarding
Multi-format output (PNG/PDF/SVG) with customizable color scheme directly addresses journal submission requirements

recommendations.title: Refusal message wording may deviate from template
recommendations.problem: The scope refusal for DEG analysis requests occasionally shows minor wording variation from the documented template.
recommendations.root_cause: Input Validation section does not mark the refusal message as verbatim-required.
recommendations.fix: Add 'respond verbatim:' before the refusal message template in Input Validation to enforce exact wording.

recommendations.title: Column name parameters not sanitized
recommendations.problem: User-provided column name parameters (--log2fc-col, --pvalue-col, --gene-col) are passed to the script without sanitization.
recommendations.root_cause: Security section does not address column name validation.
recommendations.fix: Add to Error Handling: validate that column name parameters contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens before passing to the script.
